name: gate-public-env-satisfied-accept
description: The positive counterpart of `gate-public-env-missing`. The contract references `useMapboxMap` under `@acme/mapbox`; the registered descriptor requires `GGUI_PUBLIC_APP_MAPBOX_TOKEN`; and `App.publicEnv` carries that exact key. Every declared wrapper's `requires` is satisfied, so the composed gate MUST accept. Paired with the reject case, this also proves the gate actually reads `appPublicEnv` — an env-blind gate passes one of the pair but never both.
